ddls:
CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "flight_no" INTEGER /* Flight number of the launch */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site */,
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payload */,
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the orbit */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "launch_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the launch (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "version_booster" TEXT /* Version of the booster used */,
  "booster_landing" TEXT /* Landing status of the booster (e.g., Success, Failure, No attempt) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time of the launch */,
  "mission_objective" TEXT /* Brief description of the mission's primary objective */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract associated with the launch */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the launch */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the launch */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the launch record for versioning */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the launch record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the launch record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the launch record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the launch record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_orbit_id FOREIGN KEY ("orbit_id") REFERENCES orbits ("orbit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_version_booster FOREIGN KEY ("version_booster") REFERENCES boosters ("version_booster"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_payload_id FOREIGN KEY ("payload_id") REFERENCES payloads ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launch site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Unique code or identifier for the launch site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the launch site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the launch site */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the launch site in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the launch site */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the launch site record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the launch site record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the launch site record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the launch site record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "payload_name" TEXT /* Name of the payload */,
  "payload_mass" REAL /* Mass of the payload in kilograms */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of the payload (e.g., Dragon Spacecraft, Satellite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payload */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the payload */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the payload was manufactured */,
  "expected_lifespan" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the payload in years */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payload record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payload record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payload record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payload record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbits" (
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbit */,
  "orbit_name" TEXT /* Name of the orbit (e.g., LEO, GEO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the orbit */,
  "altitude_min" TEXT /* Minimum altitude of the orbit in kilometers */,
  "altitude_max" TEXT /* Maximum altitude of the orbit in kilometers */,
  "inclination" TEXT /* Inclination of the orbit in degrees */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the orbit record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the orbit record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the orbit record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the orbit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the customer's company website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the customer */,
  "contract_value" TEXT /* Total value of the contract with the customer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the customer record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the customer record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boosters" (
  "booster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booster */,
  "version_booster" TEXT /* Version of the booster */,
  "booster_type" TEXT /* Type of the booster (e.g., F9 v1.0) */,
  "first_launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the first launch of the booster */,
  "retired_date" TEXT /* Date the booster was retired */,
  "max_thrust" TEXT /* Maximum thrust of the booster in kilonewtons */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the booster */,
  "number_of_engines" INTEGER /* Number of engines in the booster */,
  "reusability" TEXT /* Reusability status of the booster (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the booster record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booster record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the booster record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booster record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., mission planner, engineer, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the launch data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the launch data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
